cells.rationale: Open-ended forensic spike over event/git history with ambiguous attribution and a consequential GO/NOT-DOMINANT verdict that gates the whole epic — under-specified judgment work that fits sonnet, no nameable intelligence-bound reason for opus.

Well-specified foundational contract work (new claims field, ReDoS-safe glob matcher, collect-all validation, new problem code, derived render) with a nameable acceptance and multi-file blast radius — GPT-first, top gpt tier for the hardest well-specified work at contract-touching effort.

Bounded read-only verb that reuses the existing claim verdict and mirrors the selection_brief verb shape — everyday well-specified GPT work at the high sweet spot.

Cross-surface authoring of skill/scout/agent guidance requiring user-facing wording, tiered-model taste, and delicate in-repo lockstep consistency — judgment-heavy prose work that is sonnet's lane, at the multi-file known-pattern high band.

Keeper-root event-sourcing change touching a schema-ladder migration, fingerprint re-pin, and a re-fold-deterministic fold that must never throw, capturing paths inside a wedged merge without residue — a subtle correctness/schema invariant that gates opus.
Metrics/eval verb with careful but fully-specified precision/recall, multi-task dedup, and dataset-seam mirroring — well-specified GPT work at xhigh for the new-pattern, correctness-careful surface.
